title: Has the largest ancient snake ever been discovered?

title: Oil-Producing Nations Tread Lightly on Fossil Fuel Phaseout
description: Oil and gas-producing countries at this week's landmark transition summit in Colombia are avoiding firm promises — with the exception of the host.

title: France unveils plan to ditch all fossil fuels by 2050
description: France has unveiled a groundbreaking roadmap to end its reliance on fossil fuels. Coal use will cease by 2030, followed by oil in 2045 and gas in 2050. This comprehensive plan sets clear deadlines for the entire economy. The initiative was presented at an international conference in Santa Marta, Colombia, focusing on transitioning away from planet-heating fuels.

title: Music blasted from parade trucks so loud it shatters ancient museum artefacts
description: 'I have no objection to the parade. But can organisers reduce the noise?
